word: H7741 - שָׁוֵה קִרְיָתַיִם - Shâvêh Qiryâthayim - shaw-vay' kir-yawthah'-yim - Shaveh Kiriathaim

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁוה קריתים

Transliteration: shâvêh qiryâthayim

Phonetic: shaw-vay' kir-yaw-thah'-yim

BDB Definition:

Shaveh Kiriathaim = "plain of the double or two city"
  1. the place attacked by Chedorlaomer

Origin: from the same as H7740 and the dual of H7151

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
